event: Still life composition with newspaper and fruit
description: An oval-format mosaic depicting a cubist still life. Fragments of a newspaper bearing the word 'JOURNAL' overlap with curved and angular forms suggesting a bowl of fruit, a glass, and patterned fabric or tablecloth. The tessellated surface uses warm ochres, browns, whites, blacks, and touches of blue arranged in small square tiles, creating a richly textured composition against a grey-green mosaic background.
